overall.description: Gameplay footage from a Harry Potter-style game depicting a candlelit great hall with students at dining tables, transitioning to a third-person perspective following a robed character exiting through a large wooden door and descending a stone staircase. The environment features gothic architecture with wooden beams, chandeliers, and stone corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall with dining tables and chandeliers

agents.ego_description: stationary viewpoint observing students sitting at dining tables in the candlelit hall

entered.detail: large iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling beam
tall arched window with multiple panes showing dark night outside
long dark wood table with benches
large stone archway with wooden double doors at the far end of the hall

segments.scene_description: A static view of a vast gothic great hall illuminated by warm candlelight from ornate chandeliers. Students in dark robes sit sparsely at long wooden dining tables, while large arched windows reveal the night outside. The camera remains stationary, capturing the ambient atmosphere of the hall.

events.description: perspective shifts to follow a character exiting the great hall through a large wooden door into a stone corridor
character begins descending a stone spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: character in dark robes with red scarf walking briskly through doorway and down stairs

entered.detail: heavy dark wood door with iron studs that the character pushes open
full suit of medieval armor on display stand in the corridor
worn stone steps with wooden banister curving downward

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a third-person perspective following a robed character as they exit the great hall through a heavy wooden door. The character enters a dimly lit stone corridor featuring a suit of armor, then proceeds down a spiral staircase with worn steps and wall-mounted lanterns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot begins with a wide, atmospheric view of a candlelit gothic hall that transitions into a focused journey through a dimly lit stone corridor. It starts as a stationary observation of a vast great hall where students in dark robes sit at long wooden tables beneath ornate chandeliers and arched night windows. The perspective then shifts to follow a robed character from behind as they exit the warmth of the hall through a heavy wooden door. As the character moves forward, the environment transforms into a cold stone corridor featuring a suit of armor before the camera descends a spiral staircase illuminated by wall-mounted lanterns.
